info.name: KB-16 Lab Interpretation - Clinical Validation Suite
info.description:
Comprehensive clinical validation test suite for KB-16 Lab Interpretation Service.

## Test Phases
- Phase 1: KB-8 Dependency Validation
- Phase 2: Core Lab Interpretation Accuracy
- Phase 3: Panel-Level Intelligence
- Phase 4: Context-Aware Interpretation
- Phase 5: Severity & Risk Tiering
- Phase 6: Care Gap Intelligence
- Phase 7: Governance & Safety
- Phase 8: Performance & Chaos
- Phase 9: Clinical Edge Cases

## SaMD Compliance
This test suite is designed for IEC 62304 and FDA SaMD validation requirements.
